title: kochia scoparia var. subglabra
intro: Kochia scoparia var. subglabra, also known as burningbush or Chinese burn bush, is a shrub-like plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and lignans, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its medicinal value. Research suggests that kochia scoparia var. subglabra may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, making it a potential natural remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as an ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine formulas, although further studies are required to confirm its efficacy and safety.
